positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map featuring interconnecting geometric constellations, illuminated by glowing neon-blue and deep violet lines against a matte, midnight-black background. The composition should be centered, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Key motifs include stylized crescent moons, abstract shooting stars, and interconnected dots forming recognizable, yet abstract, animal and mythological silhouettes (e.g., a leaping deer, an ouroboros snake). The art style must be a blend of Art Deco elegance and modern vaporwave aesthetic, utilizing clean vector lines, high contrast, and perfect symmetry. Focus on making the glowing elements pop while keeping the background solid and dark for maximum print contrast.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoon, messy, grainy, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, cropped, distracting elements
